title: Chapter 50
content:
Chapter 50: Chapter 50: I’m Back

Within the Mission Hall, Damon approaches the counter desk where there an elder of Mission Hall.

"Greeting, elder, I’d like to give the mission proof."

He retrieved one of Flame tiger core to prove that they already completed their mission.

"Huh, Aren’t you together with disciple Mio and Mia? Where are they? Why are you alone?" The Sect Elder ask Damon since the elder register the mission on their name.

"We spilt on the way back, they said they have urgent thing to do. So, they left earlier." Damon tells the elder.

"I see, then what about the sect points?" the sect elder ask.

"They said just give it to me, since they already have a lot."

"Well, they are a core disciples. alright, I have transferred 2000 Sect Points to you for the completion of the mission." The elder said as he looks at the cat sleeping on Damon arms, but notice, it’s just a regular cat.

"Thank you, Elder." said Damon as he turned to leave.

Damon didn’t bother stay long and he walk back toward his villa.

****

"I’m back, Ariel."

Damon arrived at his villa, as soon he opens the door, Ariel jump toward his embrace, while Neko who asleep on Damon arms jolt awake as she squeezes by Ariel breast.

"Damon, I really miss you..." As she hugs Damon harder but stop when she feels something on her chest.

"Meow."

She looks down and found a little white cat between her boobs, her eyes sparkle as she found something cute.

"Oh, I’m sorry... little ones," as she let go her hug and pick the cat up and Neko to her cheeks as he looks at Damon.

"Damon, where do you find this cat? It so cute... Are we going to keep it?" asked Ariel.

"It’s not a cat, Ariel, it’s a tiger." He told Ariel.

"Tiger? are you sure? it’s obviously a cat." as she lifts Neko up and look at it with her head tilting.

"Yep, It’s a Divine Beast, Heavenly White Tiger."

Ariel froze hearing what Damon said. Damon looks at her reaction try to hold his laughter. and Neko turn her head to Damon.

’Master, who is this? She doesn’t feel like the guys from before.’ Neko ask.

’She is my woman, Ariel. You can trust her.’

’Woman? like a mate?’ she is tilting her head and ask.

’Yes, you can say that.’

Neko simply nodded and jump out Ariel hand and transform.

"T-This is..."

Ariel’s eyes widened, her gaze filled with shock as she witnessed the white little Cat’s body grow larger and taller — until it resembled a human’s figure with white cat ears and tail.

"Tha-Thats—" Ariel was to shock to speak as she stutters her word.

"Nice to meet you, master said you are his mate, so I trust you, I’m Neko." Neko said to Ariel then turn to Damon.

"Master, since now I know where you live, can I go and play? I want to explore the world!" She asks Damon with her cute childish voice with sparkling eyes.

Hearing this Damon went into a thought.

’Hmm... Well, she been trapped all her life and she actually want to explore and be free but attracted to my lightning and decide to bond with me.’

"Sure, go ahead but don’t cause trouble okay and make sure don’t be seen by anyone and put some clothes first." Damon nodded as he retrieved the clothes he bought earlier from his storage ring and give it to her.

However, Neko, who has never worn clothes before, felt uncomfortable as she covers herself.

"I guess you are still a cat at heart, huh..." Damon smiled slightly.

"Then, I’ll be back master." finished putting her clothes Neko then vanish.

’With her cultivation and lightning attribute, she should be so fast that nobody will see the glimpse of her.’

Then Damon turns toward Ariel that still frozen with her mouth gaping open.

He approached the still-frozen Ariel, gently reached out with two fingers, and pressed her gaping mouth shut before leaning in to capture her soft lips in a warm, tender kiss.

"I will tell you the detail, okay?" as he lifts her up brought her to the sofa.

Once Damon settled comfortably onto the sofa with Ariel nestled warmly in his lap, her small frame curled naturally against his chest.

Damon began to tell her the full story about everything that had happen after he had left earlier — from the moment he left right up until he found the peculiar, lightning-streaked cat girl had vanished through the window.

****

After Damon hearing the story, Ariel trying to process the story. Damon looks at her status while at it.

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Relationship: In Love]

[Interest: 999/1000]

[Chastity: Claim by Damon]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Water: 40, Spear: 50]

[Spiritual Roots: Sea Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Sea Princess] [Mortal Grade - Low]

[Traits: Sensitive Body, Graceful, Young Lady, Kind, Loyal, Lustful]

[Desire: "I miss Damon being inside me so much..."]

"No need to think too much about it, my love. Let’s focus on you..." Damon stop Ariel for thinking too much.

"You right, nothing will change if I just keep thinking about it, what important is I have new sister, right?"

"Yes, can meet her later, and congratulation for your breakthrough. Do you want a reward for it?"

Hearing a praise for Damon make her happy but quickly change as he asks what she want.

"You, know what I want, right?" Her eyes become lustful and seductive voice, as she moves her hand began stroking around Damon groin.

"Ohh, it seems you miss Damon Jr, more than me..." he gave Ariel a sly pervy grin.

"Well, what can I do? It feels so good..." she said with playful tone while licking her lips.

"Then go ahead you can greet Damon Jr." added with a smile.

Ariel the began loosening up Damon pants.
